trials.generatedText: During his trial at Widdersdorf U-19 at the U-19 Tier 3 level in March 2026, Abdul showcased several notable qualities including good dribbling, good attitude, and was nervous at the beginning but adapted well. Coach Thomas Müller evaluated Abdul across multiple training sessions and match situations.

itp_players_25-26.coachNotes: Abdul has shown great improvement. Specially in decision-making, and personality on and off the field.
